name: Show-Me
description_short: Show-Me Credit Union is a Missouri-based financial institution established in 1954, serving over 3,600 members with $34.4M in assets and comprehensive banking services.
description_long:
Show-Me Credit Union was established in 1954 and is headquartered in Mexico, Missouri, where it operates as a state-chartered credit union. The institution has built a local presence over nearly 70 years, focusing on serving the financial needs of Missouri residents through membership-based banking.

Show-Me offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), credit cards, auto loans, personal loans, business loans, and mortgage options (both fixed-rate and adjustable-rate). Members can access online banking, mobile app services, bill pay, wire transfers, e-statements, mobile payments, and financial counseling. The credit union also provides IRA/KEOGH accounts, online loan payments, and drive-thru teller services.

The institution distinguishes itself through personalized service, as evidenced by member reviews praising specific staff members for professionalism and helpfulness. With over 10 dedicated employees and a single main branch location at 550 S Muldrow in Mexico, Missouri, Show-Me maintains a community-focused approach to banking. The credit union offers financial education resources and student scholarships to support member financial wellness.

As a smaller credit union with $34.4M in assets and 3,600 members, Show-Me serves a regional membership base with limited physical infrastructure (1 branch, 1 ATM). While members appreciate the personalized service, the limited branch network may restrict accessibility compared to larger regional or national credit unions. The website indicates current lobby and drive-thru closure hours, though status can be monitored through their service dashboard. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking with bill pay and external account transfers
pros: Established 70-year history since 1954 with proven track record in Missouri
Member reviews specifically praise staff professionalism (5.0/5 rating based on 2 reviews)
Comprehensive product offerings including mortgages, auto loans, business loans, and CDs
Mobile app available for both iOS and Android with online banking capabilities
Offers financial counseling, financial education, and student scholarships
Community-focused institution with personalized service approach
State-chartered credit union providing competitive rates and terms
cons: Single branch location limits physical accessibility to Mexico, Missouri area only
Only 1 ATM available, restricting cash access convenience
Smaller asset base ($34.4M) compared to regional/national credit unions may limit product customization
Limited geographic membership eligibility restricted to Missouri state charter
Small review sample size (only 2 reviews) provides limited member feedback dataset
best_for: Missouri residents in or near Mexico, Missouri seeking personalized local banking
Individuals and small businesses needing relationship-based financial services
Credit union members prioritizing community involvement and financial education support
Local business owners requiring business loans and comprehensive banking solutions
diagnosis: Show-Me Credit Union is best for Missouri residents near Mexico seeking personalized, relationship-based banking with comprehensive lending products. The primary caveat is limited geographic and physical accessibility—with only one branch and one ATM, this institution suits those who can visit the main office or are willing to primarily use digital banking channels.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
